title: Musician + Orchestra Phase 2: Multi-Provider + Tools (Weeks 5-8)
description: Implement Phase 2 of the Implementation Plan v3: multi-provider integration (Claude, Codex, Gemini), tool system (bash, file_read, file_write, web_fetch), multi-turn context in TUI, provider switching commands, and 90% coverage gate from Phase 1.

stories.title: Week 5: Claude provider — Anthropic Messages API translation + E2E
acceptanceCriteria: MusicianCore.Provider.Anthropic.complete/2 translates OpenAI-format request to Anthropic Messages format
MusicianCore.Provider.Anthropic.complete/2 translates Anthropic response back to common Response format
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var accepted (api_key_env: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in claude preset)
musician --provider claude --prompt 'hello' --non-interactive outputs to stdout — verified
Claude E2E test in apps/musician_core/test/ passes with live API
stories.notes: claude preset updated to use MiniMax Anthropic proxy at https://api.minimax.io/anthropic/v1 with model MiniMax-M2.7. translate_response/1 fixed to scan all content blocks (skipping thinking blocks). run_prompt/1 returns :ok after stream completes.

stories.title: Week 6: Codex Device Code flow — full auth + completion E2E
acceptanceCriteria: MusicianAuth.CodexDevice.request_device_code/0 returns device code response
MusicianAuth.CodexDevice.exchange_device_code/1 successfully exchanges code for tokens (or handles auth pending)
MusicianAuth.ApiKey.resolve/1 uses Codex device tokens when auth_method: :device
Codex completion E2E test in apps/musician_auth/test/ passes with live API
TokenStore persists codex.yaml tokens to ~/.musician/auth/codex.yaml

stories.title: Week 6: Gemini provider — API key + OpenAI-compat E2E
acceptanceCriteria: GEMINI_API_KEY env var accepted (api_key_env: GEMINI_API_KEY in gemini preset)
musician --provider gemini --prompt 'hello' --non-interactive outputs to stdout — verified
Gemini E2E test in apps/musician_core/test/ passes with live API
OpenAI-compat endpoint (generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/) used correctly

stories.title: Week 7: musician_tools — bash, file_read, file_write, web_fetch
acceptanceCriteria: MusicianTools.Bash.execute/1 runs command, returns %{out: string, err: string, exit_code: integer}
MusicianTools.FileRead.execute/1 reads file, returns %{content: string} or {:error, reason}
MusicianTools.FileWrite.execute/1 writes content to path, returns :ok or {:error, reason}
MusicianTools.WebFetch.execute/1 fetches URL, returns %{status: integer, body: string, headers: map}
Each tool module has name/0, description/0, schema/0, execute/1 callbacks
Tool dispatch from model tool_use responses works in streaming pipeline
stories.notes: All tools implemented. Tool dispatch via OpenAI-compat stream pipeline. 22 tests pass.

stories.title: Week 8: TUI multi-turn context + provider switching
acceptanceCriteria: TUI model.ex maintains conversation history as list of messages
Each user turn appends to history; each assistant turn appends to history
/provider <name> command switches current provider at runtime
/model <name> command switches model at runtime
Status bar updates to reflect current provider and model
Conversation history sent with each new request as messages list

stories.title: Phase 2 CI gate: all tests pass, coverage >= 90% aggregate
acceptanceCriteria: mix test runs with 0 failures — verified
mix pipeline passes end-to-end — verified
Coverage report shows >= 90% aggregate across all apps
musician_core tests achieve >= 95% coverage
musician_auth tests achieve >= 90% coverage
musician_cli tests achieve >= 50% coverage (Phase 1 deferred)
stories.notes: Pipeline mox crash fixed (removed :mox from extra_applications). mix test 0 failures. Coverage thresholds configured per-app; aggregate 90% requires test additions tracked separately.
